feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Profitability and Performance Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Profitability and Performance Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PaPM On Premise - Dual Control with Simulation Process Template
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is it possible to manage the order of activities if the process template is set as "Simulation"? (Example: If task A001 was not completed, prevent task A002 from running.) Because I noticed that this is possible if the process template is set as "Run" by setting the "previous activity" column but this type of template does not allow the possibility of modifying the parameters.

Thank you,
Riccardo

entry.title: RFA PAPM accounts payable item function issue
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

we are trying post back from PaPM to S/4 using RFA Accounts payable line item function. however getting error-

 

No currency line item exists for line item 000000002 (parameters account GL), we tried all options but no luck.

 

we have only one currency field which was mapped already. Has anyone used this function before: do we need any additional config for this ? please suggest as we are able to post all other RFA GL/ accounts payable works

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
entry.content:
Hello,
Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
(if the company haven't SAP Hana or others SAP technologies)

entry.title: PaPM Cloud SM - Selective Deletion in an Executable Function
entry.content:
Hi Masters, 

How are you doing?

I have a theoretical case that we don't know how to solve yet in PaPM Cloud SM.

This is the case: 

I have a process template with an executable function at the end (Join function) and all the reports attached (Queries). The Selection field is "Period".

By mistake, a second process template with the same period was executed and this created a second set of data, therefore data is duplicated. What we need is to remove the set of data from the process duplicated. Either the process is removed, data persist in the function. 

Graphically would be something like this: 

We have set the parameter :l_proc_id  as a field and we can filter them, but in the end, this is functionally but not practical as there is data that we know is duplicated. 

I know that PaPM is not a DW, but we are not using PaPM to store data, we are going to store it for 3 months and then move to a DW. 

One option is to erase all data from the function but when we are at the third month this would be a problem as we would have to run the two previous months.  

Is there a way to achieve this?

Regards

entry.title: Use Calculated Measure and Calculated Dimension in Report Management
entry.content:
Experts, 

Have you used the Calculated measure and Calculated dimensions in PaPM OP/PCE? Any example? We have been trying that but there's no documentation and we haven't got any results. 

If anyone has an example I would appreciate.

entry.title: Date Format Need to Change in talent profile performance history portlet, only year.
entry.content:
Hi All , 

We have a requirement from business to change the date format in employee profile under  performance history portlet.

Business need a only year(YYYY) instead of ( DD/MM/YYYY), in performance history portlet.

We have checked all the possibility but we not able to modify and achieve this request. 

Please do let know is anyone have a same request for your respective business and how we can fulfill this requirement or do we have any workaround.

 

Best Regards, 

Dhanush Kumar

entry.title: PAPM On Premise - Unable to see "Calculation" tabs in modeling
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm facing a unusual UI bheaviour that started this morning. Since yesterday, in the modeling environment, I was able to see the settings of the different functions of an Environment I was exploring. Now for example, if a click on a Calculation function

 

As you can see, I can't see on the right side the components tabs of a calculation function. Yesterday I was able to see it. Moreover, my colleague see it, see below stamp

I tried to reboot my pc. To delete cookies but nothing changed.

We are also using the same browser.

Any suggestions to solve this issue?

Thanks

entry.title: How to post data from SAP PaPM on HANA to SAP ECC on HANA,
entry.content: How to post data from SAP PaPM on HANA to SAP ECC on HANA we have a requirement of triggering FB01 transaction in SAP ECC on HANA from SAP PaPM on HANA is there any other better , faster way to do the integration between the 2 applications on HANA databases

entry.title: SAP GR to SAC/PaPM/COPA or vice versa possible?
entry.content:
We need to be able to accomplish one of the below scenarios. Is it possible with standard functionality? If not then what kind of custom development is required?

  1. Load consolidated data (lowest GL account granularity) from GR to SAC/PaPM/COPA for the purpose of top-down distribution and reporting
  2. Load distributed data (lowest GL account granularity) from SAC/PaPM/COPA to GR for the purpose of consolidation and reporting

entry.title: PAPM: In which table is the field message text (MSG_TEXT_UI) stored for application monitor?
entry.content:
For PAPM application monitor, I can view much of the data I need by creating model views against tables 

/NXI/TP1AL and /NXI/TP1ALMSG 

however, a key field that contains the message text is not included in either table.  How can I locate MSG_TEXT_UI)

Thanks for any suggestions.

entry.title: How to load \ ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition
entry.content:
Hello 

Greetings

Has anyone ingested .parquet file in SAP PaPM on-premise edition. I am aware that there is a 'file adapter' function, but i believe this is only used for ingesting \ loading .csv or .xls file formats only.

If we have to ingest .parquet files in SAP PaPM on-premise edition, then what is the best and the recommended way of doing so?

@JustinAngeles

@emanuele_fumeo 

Thanks

Amogh

entry.title: PaPM cloud, how to calculate IRR
entry.content:
Hi everybody

In SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM cloud) I need to calculate IRR, I was try to use a RFC function with Python code ussing  IRR fromnumpy_financial library, but unfortunately it's not possible buscause apparently it doesn't support the library.

Somebody knows other ways ussgin python or other function in papm.

 

I apreciate any helps

 

Regards.

 

Juan

entry.title: PaPM Universal Model: Parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

In PaPM Standard Model we have functionality to define parameter on process level, is there similar function available in UM? only place i see is to define parameter at activities level. 

In our model, we have independent activities where we need to specify data and month, and defining parameter for each activity does not seems efficient way to handle the task. Also not all the function which require parameter bound to Activity. Can you please help or Point to blog where it Parameters in UM are explained in details or have faced similar issue.

#PaPMCloudUM

entry.title: Data Discovery SAC Live Connection
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I am requesting your help. I am currently trying to read information from a table in a live connection model from PaPM. We have a script that, upon page initialization, can read the information directly from the table when it was created from a CSV file data source. This table can be read perfectly through the Analytics Designer Table API.

I've been researching, and it seems that live connection does not support data discovery. Is there any way to achieve this? I am sharing the script below of what I've got so far.

 

 

var dataSource = Table_1.getDataSource();
var dimensions = dataSource.getDimensions(); // Obtiene las dimensiones
var measures = dataSource.getMembers("Measures", 1000); // Obtiene los miembros de la dimensión "Measures" (medidas)


var accData = dataSource.getResultSet();


var stringCSV = "";


var i = 0;
var j = 0;
var k = 0;
var m = 0;
var n = 0;
var tempString = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var dimId = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var measureName = ""; // Inicializada como cadena vacía
var dimensionValue = ""; // Para valores de dimensión
var measureValue = ""; // Para valores de medida


for (i = 0; i < dimensions.length; i++) {
tempString = stringCSV + dimensions[i].description + ",";
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (j = 0; j < measures.length; j++) {
if (j < measures.length - 1) {
tempString = stringCSV + measures[j].description + ","; // Usa 'description' para nombre legible de la medida
} else {
tempString = stringCSV + measures[j].description + "\n";
}
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (k = 0; k < accData.length; k++) {
// Recorre las dimensiones dinámicamente
for (m = 0; m < dimensions.length; m++) {
dimId = dimensions[m].id; // Obtiene el ID de la dimensión


dimensionValue = accData[k][dimId].formattedValue || accData[k][dimId].id || "N/A";

tempString = stringCSV + dimensionValue + ",";
stringCSV = tempString;
}


for (n = 0; n < measures.length; n++) {
measureName = measures[n].id;


measureValue = accData[k][measureName].rawValue || "N/A";

if (n < measures.length - 1) {
tempString = stringCSV + measureValue + ",";
} else {
tempString = stringCSV + measureValue + "\n";
}
stringCSV = tempString;
}
}


contextData = stringCSV;

entry.title: Upload file in Application server (AL11) in SAP Profitability & Performance Management/BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Are you struggling to understand how can we upload the files from application server without SAP delivered transactions CG3Z and CG3Y in SAP Performance Management system. Incase if the file size is larger than accepted it is not possible to upload in regular method of uploading directly in PaPM system.

  • "CG3Z" is typically used for uploading files into the SAP system
  • "CG3Y" is used for exporting files from the SAP system

Instead we have SAP delivered functional modules available to perform this activity. Let us walk through the step by step process to perform Upload files from AL11 in SAP BW/4HANA and Profitability and Performance Management.

Process to upload the files in AL11: 

Step 1: Save the required file in .CSV format in your desktop 

Step 2: Login to SAP and go to the Transaction code SE37 and enter the functional module ARCHIVFILE_CLIENT_TO_SERVER as below

Then hit Execute button as show above.

Step 3:  We need to provide the Path (Source path: for example your desktop file path) and Target path (Application server (AL11) path). In case if the file is case sensitive then selection the option other wise you can execute to upload the file.

Execute the functional module with all the selections and the file will be processed as below,

I hope you like this post!!

Thanks,

Shyam.

entry.title: “SAP Profitability and Performance Management” - Import an Prem Model in PaPM Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding the new export option

SAP PaPM On-Premise: Exporting Environments - SAP Community

Is it possible to reimport it directly on PaPM Cloud? 

Regards

Simon

entry.title: How to manage sequence of functions in SAP PaPM Cloud?
entry.content:
I have some functions in my model that depend on several functions needing to be executed in a specific order. In particular, I need to write the output of some Join functions in different HANA model tables. I created a Writer function for each Join, and a Join function that takes all the Writers as input, in order to run all the Writers by executing just one function.

 
How can I manage and choose the execution order of functions or create a custom function execution chain in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud?
 
I’ve already tried following the steps outlined in this post "How to manage sequence of functions in execution chain" (https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-profitability-and-performance-management-how-to-manage-sequence-of/ba-p/13460534), but they aren’t working as expected.
 
What additional strategies or tips can you recommend?
 
Thank you in advance.
 
SAP Profitability and Performance Management

entry.title: 500 error in PaPM Cloud
entry.content:
Hi 

I just copied sample contents SXP(Profitability and Cost Management) and activated all functions 

but when I click the process it show 500 error screen. 

I just translated english to korean and it was work before...

what do I have to I do ?

entry.title: Profitability report by the Profit center group
entry.content:
Hi All,

One of my client is having the requirement to generate the profitability report by the profit center group.

since we don't have the standard character of profit center group. as selection input. 

please let me know if you have any work around solution.

what are the standard report available in the sap for profit center?

 

Regards,

Santhosha BH

entry.title: API Consumption from S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition to SAP Profitability and Performance Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm having trouble with API consumption from S4 Hana Cloud PE to a SAP PaPM Cloud tenant.

The APIs in question are: 

Product Master (A2X)
Business Partner (A2X)

I've created a conection between the SAP S4 Hana Cloud and the SAP BTP in which the SAP PaPM Cloud resides. And on s4 hana, I've created a Communication System, and Communication Arrangement. **All inbound*

 

 

And I've configured the connection like this on PaPM

 

 

 

I can see the fields of the API without a problem

 

I map the fields, and after saving, activating and running I get the following error: /NXI/P1_N/104 Error calling oData service destination: S4CtoPaPM; <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><error xmlns

 

 

Also I want to take all the data at once, or get it one by one, like the following example.

 

Thank you in advance with any advice. Hope someone can help me. 

Best Regards
